questions.What surprised me today?: I realized how much I've been stuck in planning without integration.
questions.What am I grateful for?: I'm grateful for the opportunity to reflect and make changes.
questions.What did I learn about myself?: I learned that I need to simplify before adding complexity.
questions.What would I do differently?: I would focus on integration before analysis.
questions.What am I looking forward to?: I'm looking forward to breaking through to automatic integration.
